field_label: General Attendance
source_field: infant_feeding | breastfeeding_entries | muac_value_mm | muac_class | admission_status
transform_rule: child_health.exclusive_breastfeeding: Union distinct child/patient where Exclusive BF or E code appears in period. ; child_health.muac_screened: Count rows with non-null MUAC within period. ; child_health.sam_new_cases: Count rows with muac_class=Red within period. ; child_health.mam_new_cases: Count rows with muac_class=Yellow within period. ; child_health.sam_admissions: Count rows with admission_status=Admitted HP OTP within period.

field_label: Old Attendance (Return)
